data.body: LANDED: all 6 audit-enrichment changes (687/688/692/693/695/698) MERGED to main atomically via Gerrit submit of the stack top (698). Required a manual rebase onto advanced main (opcert epic landed; conflict in generated docs/cli-reference.md resolved by regeneration) + 3 CI rechecks on 692 (pre-existing git-HEAD-race flake in commit-heavy tests, unrelated to e7e0; passes locally). origin/main tip: 5a39f85eb. Now re-certifying e7e0+epic (e7e0 attestation staled by my post-close restoration of its foreign-corrupted description; epic closed unsigned as a result).
